title: Breaking into Impel Down

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Fall and split your head open!!!

dialogue.text: You're done for, you sea gorilla!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wow! They... they beat the Blogori!!
